description: Worked at HUZL, a freelance platform where hirers post jobs and hustlers apply, manage projects, and track work after hiring.

I built the backend for Hustler Development Program (HDP), a contest feature where users participate in competitions (like photography, development) and win rewards based on rankings. I handled schema design, APIs, and overall contest flow.
I built the Community and Activity feature where platform activities like hiring, posting projects, following users, and other actions are shown in a feed.
I implemented follow and unfollow functionality and created a ‘Following’ tab to show activity only from users you follow.
I faced race condition issues while handling activity counts and updates, and fixed them to ensure data stays correct during concurrent operations.
I used MongoDB aggregation to fetch and structure activity feed data efficiently even with high activity.
I worked on a major feature called Session-Based Booking where hustlers can create sessions and hirers can book them.
I designed the complete database schema for session providers, session types (like 30 mins, 60 mins), availability, and recurring session patterns.
I added MongoDB transactions in multiple APIs to make sure operations are atomic, so partial or broken data does not get saved when users leave flows incomplete.
I built logic to list sessions by pairing hustlers and hirers and showing only the latest session per day for each pair.
I fixed multiple bugs in payment-related flows after integration and improved overall reliability of bookings.
I also worked on frontend improvements for booking flows and improved the landing page UI with better structure and animations.
Worked across Next.js, Node.js, MongoDB, and AWS, with more focus on backend logic and data handling.
Worked with Kaiz La (China-based product) as a freelance developer through a Bangalore client to build their landing page and an AI chatbot experience.
I built the full landing page for the product and connected it with a chatbot flow through a ‘Talk to Expert’ entry point.
I built a RAG-based chatbot where users can ask questions about the product and get answers based on company data instead of generic responses.
I created backend APIs where the admin can upload product data, which is converted into embeddings and stored in a vector database (Pinecone).
When a user asks a question, the system retrieves relevant context from the vector database and sends it to GPT to generate accurate answers.
I handled the full backend flow for query processing, context retrieval, and response generation.
I added a feature where users can schedule a call with a human expert directly from the chatbot.
I integrated Calendly for scheduling and set up email notifications for both user and company after booking.
I used PostgreSQL with Prisma to manage structured data and Upstash Redis for caching and improving response speed.
Worked across frontend, backend, database design, and AI integration using TypeScript and Node.js.
Worked directly with the founder to build BuildMyCV, an AI-powered resume platform where users can create, analyze, and improve resumes based on job requirements.
I built features where users can generate resumes using AI and edit them through an interactive interface.
I developed a feature where users can upload their resume along with a job description, and the system analyzes how well the resume matches the job using AI.
I built an AI assistant that helps users understand their resume, gives suggestions on what to improve, and answers questions based on their profile.
I implemented a job recommendation system where AI suggests relevant jobs from a pool of listings based on the user’s resume.
I worked on AI flows using LangChain and Gemini AI to generate structured outputs for resume content and analysis.
I integrated Stripe payments to support subscription-based access and premium features.
I handled both frontend and backend development using Next.js and Node.js, and used Firebase for storing user data and resume-related information.
Worked across the full stack to connect AI features, payments, and user workflows into a single product.
Worked as a freelance full stack developer to build the company’s web platform and landing page from scratch.
I developed a responsive landing page to present the company’s vision, projects, and information clearly.
I built a notice system where admins can create, edit, and delete notices, and users can view them on a dedicated notice page.
I developed an admin panel to manage notices and basic user-related operations.
I implemented authentication and authorization using JWT to secure admin actions.
I worked on SEO improvements and performance optimizations to improve page load speed and visibility.
I used caching techniques to reduce server load and improve response times.
Worked across frontend and backend using Next.js, Node.js, and MongoDB to deliver a complete working platform.
